emails.subject: Re: Lost Demand
emails.body: Re: Lost Demand I think it will be extra important to add "lost demand" from brownouts and blackouts to consumption to get the real growth rate of power demand this year. There was an increment of this for 1999 given the problems in New York City and Chicago and maybe elsewhere. Rob Robert L. Bradley Jr. Director, Public Policy Analysis Enron Corp. P.O Box 1188, Room 4724a [1400 Smith Street 77002] Houston, Texas 77251-1188 (P) 713-853-3062 (F) 713-646-4702 Assistant: Joan Stransky 713-853-4702 jstrans@enron.com Jeff Dasovich 09/22/2000 06:24 PM

emails.subject: Re: Lost Demand
emails.body: Agreed. Also, Margaret, do we have numbers on what portion of GDP and California's "GDP" the tech sector represents? Best, Jeff Rob Bradley 09/24/2000 11:51 AM
